name: Matter-Server
description: Python Matter Server for Home Assistant. Required for Matter/Thread device commissioning and management. Connects to Home Assistant via WebSocket on port 5580. Must run with host networking for mDNS and Bluetooth support.

paths.name: Matter Data
paths.description: Persistent Matter fabric data, credentials and PAA root certificates. Essential for maintaining device pairings across restarts.

paths.name: D-Bus Socket
paths.description: D-Bus socket for Bluetooth commissioning of Matter devices. Required for Bluetooth LE pairing.

variables.name: Storage Path
variables.description: Path where Matter server stores fabric data and credentials. Must match the container volume mount.

variables.name: Bluetooth Adapter
variables.description: Bluetooth adapter index for commissioning. 0 = first adapter (hci0). Set to -1 to disable Bluetooth commissioning.

variables.name: WebSocket Port
variables.description: WebSocket port for Home Assistant Matter integration connection. Default is 5580. Use this port in HA: ws://localhost:5580/ws

variables.name: PAA Root Cert Directory
variables.description: Directory for PAA (Product Attestation Authority) root certificates. Used for Matter device attestation.
